allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\80921993\\github\\relic\\Relicを起動.bat"\); $crlf = 0; $lf = 0; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $bytes.Length - 1; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -eq 13 -and $bytes[$i+1] -eq 10\) { $crlf++ } elseif \($bytes[$i] -eq 10 -and \($i -eq 0 -or $bytes[$i-1] -ne 13\)\) { $lf++ } }; "CRLF: $crlf, LF-only: $lf")
